## Type of Change
- [ ] 🎨 UX/UI Improvement
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility Fix
- [ ] 🚀 New Feature
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix
- [ ] 📝 Documentation Update

## UX & Accessibility Checklist
- [ ] **Keyboard Navigation**: All interactive elements are accessible via keyboard.
- [ ] **ARIA Labels**: Icon-only buttons and complex components have descriptive ARIA labels.
- [ ] **Color Contrast**: Text and UI elements meet WCAG AA contrast standards.
- [ ] **Focus States**: Clear visual indicators for focused elements are implemented.
- [ ] **Loading States**: Async operations provide visual feedback to the user.
- [ ] **Responsive**: Changes look and function well on different screen sizes.
